_README: Editable club lookup for the 11th Sabor (2024-), keyed by club_slug. 'bloc' (vlada/oporba) set from the HDZ-led coalition (HDZ, DP, HSLS, HNS, HSU + aligned minorities/independents embedded in the 'NZ' clubs) cross-checked against each club's voting alignment with HDZ on contested votes — the five vlada clubs all sit at 100%. NOTE: the SDSS club (~34% with HDZ) and the HSS/GLS/Orešković club (~2%) vote with the opposition despite party-level expectations, so they're oporba; HDS sits inside the HDZ club; IDS is opposition but unusually HDZ-friendly (~86%). 'parties' for joint clubs is best-effort. Consumers must ignore any key starting with '_'.
